summary: A kinetic intercept of a Ukrainian fixed-wing UAV was conducted by the Russian "Elka" air defense drone in spring 2026. The "Rubicon" Center reported 104 targets destroyed on March 11 and 162 on March 10, including personnel strikes, FPV anti-drone operations, and joint missions with Aerospace Forces targeting Ukrainian UAV control centers. A Ukrainian FPV drone destroyed an American MaxxPro armored vehicle in Dobropole, and Russian soldiers faced simultaneous FPV drone strikes while taking cover. Ukrainian forces are fielding advanced drones like the "Molnias," which evade Russian EW due to unknown control frequencies, while BM-35/70 drone attacks on Sumy have decreased, possibly due to production issues, intensified EW, or Starlink disruptions.
